history.label: The Winery
history.title: A Family Legacy in Guria
history.body: Nestled in the verdant hills of Lanchkhuti, the Sarishvili family has cultivated vines for generations. Founded on a deep respect for Georgian winemaking traditions, our estate combines ancestral knowledge with thoughtful modern practices to produce wines that truly express the soul of Guria.

region.label: The Region
region.title: Guria — Georgia's Hidden Gem
region.body: The Guria region, tucked between the Lesser Caucasus and the Black Sea coast, offers a unique terroir shaped by humid subtropical winds and mineral-rich soils. This microclimate is perfectly suited to the Ckhaveri grape, producing wines of exceptional freshness and aromatic complexity.

grape.label: The Grape
grape.title: Ckhaveri — Georgia's Rosé Treasure
grape.body: Ckhaveri is an ancient indigenous Georgian grape variety found almost exclusively in Guria and Adjara. It naturally produces elegant rosé wines with a pale copper hue, vibrant acidity, and delicate notes of red berries, pomegranate, and wildflowers. It is a grape that cannot be found anywhere else in the world.

ckhaveri2022.name: Ckhaveri Rosé 2022
ckhaveri2022.tasting: A structured rosé with a luminous copper-pink hue. The nose opens with pomegranate, ripe strawberry, and a hint of rose petal. On the palate, vibrant acidity balances notes of red currant and citrus zest, leading to a long, mineral finish.
ckhaveri2022.pairing: Grilled seafood, Georgian mchadi cornbread, aged cheese, summer salads

ckhaveri2023.name: Ckhaveri Rosé 2023
ckhaveri2023.tasting: Pale salmon in colour with an expressive bouquet of wild strawberry, raspberry, and dried herbs. The palate is refreshingly light with a crisp, clean finish — perfect for warm-weather enjoyment.
ckhaveri2023.pairing: Fresh herb salads, lobiani bean bread, white fish, charcuterie

ckhaveri2024.name: Ckhaveri Rosé 2024
ckhaveri2024.tasting: Our newest vintage shows the elegance of a cooler harvest year. Delicate pink hue, aromas of peach blossom and red cherry, with a silky texture, lively acidity, and an exceptionally clean, lingering finish.
ckhaveri2024.pairing: Sushi, light pasta, Georgian pkhali, soft ripened cheeses

storeLocator.heading: Where to Find Us
storeLocator.subheading: Visit the winery or find our wines at select locations across Georgia

meta.title: Sarishvili Winery — Ckhaveri Rosé from Guria, Georgia
meta.description: Sarishvili Winery produces handcrafted Ckhaveri rosé wines in Lanchkhuti, Guria. Discover our 2022, 2023 and 2024 vintages — authentic Georgian wines with soul.
meta.ogDescription: Handcrafted Georgian rosé from the heart of Guria. Shop the 2022, 2023 & 2024 vintages.
